idea-plugin.name: Ic10 Language
idea-plugin.description:
Full IDE support for the IC10 MIPS-like scripting language used in Stationeers.

Editor

  • Syntax highlighting for instructions, registers, device references, labels, numbers, and enums
  • Code completion for instructions, registers (r0–r17, ra, sp), device slots (db, d0–d5), logic types, and enum values
  • Parameter info hints showing argument names and types for every instruction
  • Inlay parameter name hints
  • Error and warning annotations (unknown instructions, wrong argument count, undefined labels, etc.)
  • Go-to-definition and find usages for labels and named registers
  • Code formatting and smart Enter handler
  • Structure view and file outline
  • Status bar widget showing line count against the IC10 limit

Documentation

  • Quick-docs for all IC10 instructions with parameter descriptions
  • Quick-docs for registers, device references, and enum values
  • Stationpedia integration: game device data downloaded at build time, used for logic-property completions and docs
  • Deprecation notices for deprecated logic types
  • Enum value support: LogicType.Activate style literals with highlighting and completions

Debugger

  • IC10 run configurations — select which .ic10 files to simulate
  • Full JetBrains XDebugger integration: breakpoints, variable inspection
  • Step-over (execute one instruction), full-tick (advance one game tick), and step-back
  • Complete IC10 instruction simulation engine with device model, network model, and stack memory
  • Slot instructions (ls, ss, lbs, lbns, sbs) are not yet simulated and will cause a compilation error if used in a run configuration
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 2.1
    • Multi-device simulation: new IC10 Environment run configuration driven by an .ic10env config file.
    • Environment config supports IC10 circuit housings, passive stationpedia devices (e.g. StructureMemory), and fabricator-class devices (Autolathe, PipeBender, …) with initial property overrides.
    • Networks can be declared explicitly or default to a single shared data network.
    • .ic10env files accept YAML or JSON, with full schema validation and autocompletion in the editor.
    • New → IC10 Environment Config file template for scaffolding .ic10env files.
    • Multi-device debugger automatically switches focus to the device that hit a breakpoint.
    • Debugger shows a Status entry explaining why a device halted (runtime error reason or hcf caught-fire state).
    • Fixed validation of indirect device references (drX); register indirection is now capped at 10 levels.
    • Fixed jump execution (no spurious auto-advance after an explicit jump) and stack handling.
  • 2.0
    • IC10 debugger: run configurations, breakpoints, step-over, full-tick, and step-back via JetBrains XDebugger.
    • Simulation engine: complete IC10 instruction set, device and network model, stack memory, reagents and crafting support.
    • Stationpedia integration: all game devices and their logic properties loaded from live game data.
    • Enum syntax support: LogicType.Activate style values with highlighting, completions, and quick-docs.
    • Quick-docs for registers, device references, and enum values (including deprecation notices).
  • 1.5 Improved quick-docs, added parameter info hints and formatting support.
  • 1.4 Updated compatible ide versions.
  • 1.3 Improved navigation.
  • 1.2 Added support for channels and printer constants.
  • 1.1 Added documentation for available instructions.
